content: hi all, renata here, i shoot restaurant menus around fort greene. mostly natural window light, occasionally a single strobe when the dining room is dark.
welcome! i food style and shoot on the side. happy to swap dairy-free plating tricks, cashew cream behaves so much better on camera than it has any right to.
new to the group, based in williamsburg. spent the last year doing overhead flatlays for a couple of bakeries and finally going full freelance.
hey everyone, i mostly do prop sourcing and plating for editorial shoots. if anyone needs vintage ceramics from the brooklyn flea i have a stash.
intro: imani, brooklyn food photographer. obsessed with steam and texture shots. would love to find a few people to do a natural light meetup with this winter.
